# datadog_scorecard_rules (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about existing Datadog scorecard rules.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "datadog_scorecard_rules" "enabled_rules" {
  filter_enabled = true
  filter_name    = "Has a README"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter_custom` (Boolean) Filter for custom rules only.
- `filter_description` (String) Filter rules by description.
- `filter_enabled` (Boolean) Filter for enabled rules only.
- `filter_name` (String) Filter rules by name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `rules` (Block List) List of scorecard rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules))

<a id="nestedblock--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules`

Read-Only:

- `custom` (Boolean) Whether the rule is a custom rule.
- `description` (String) Description of the rule.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the rule is enabled.
- `id` (String) The ID of the scorecard rule.
- `level` (String) The maturity level of the rule.
- `name` (String) Name of the rule.
- `owner` (String) Owner of the rule.
- `scorecard_name` (String) Name of the scorecard this rule belongs to.
